name: SensorNet
one_liner: Decentralized IoT sensor network where data contributors earn tokens for sharing environmental readings.
sui_advantage: Sensor data objects with timestamps from Sui consensus ensure data integrity, PTBs batch multiple sensor readings per transaction, Walrus stores raw data.

name: ComputeShare
one_liner: Decentralized GPU compute marketplace where providers rent idle compute and users submit AI inference jobs.
sui_advantage: Job objects track compute tasks with dynamic fields for status and results, PTBs handle job submission, payment, and result delivery atomically.

name: EnergyGrid
one_liner: Peer-to-peer energy trading platform where solar panel owners sell excess energy to neighbors.
sui_advantage: Energy credit objects are fungible Coin types tradeable on DeepBook, PTBs settle energy trades atomically, IoT meter data stored on Walrus.

name: WiFiMesh
one_liner: Community WiFi network where hotspot hosts earn tokens for providing internet connectivity.
sui_advantage: Hotspot objects with dynamic fields track uptime and bandwidth, PTBs distribute rewards based on usage, sponsored transactions for user authentication.

name: StorageNet
one_liner: Decentralized storage network that extends Walrus with edge caching nodes earning rewards for serving content.
sui_advantage: Built as a complementary layer to Walrus, storage proofs verified on Sui, reward distribution via PTBs, node objects track performance.

name: WeatherDAO
one_liner: Crowdsourced weather data network where personal weather stations contribute to a decentralized forecast system.
sui_advantage: Weather reading objects from multiple sources aggregated via shared objects, PTBs batch readings, Walrus stores historical data for model training.

name: DroneFleet
one_liner: Decentralized drone delivery coordination platform where drone operators register routes and earn per delivery.
sui_advantage: Route objects and delivery objects managed on Sui, PTBs handle order-assignment-payment atomically, drone telemetry on Walrus.

name: ParkingMeter
one_liner: Smart parking network where IoT-enabled spots accept crypto payments and share occupancy data.
sui_advantage: Parking spot objects with real-time status via dynamic fields, PTBs handle payment-and-reservation atomically, sponsored transactions for seamless parking.

name: AirQuality
one_liner: Community air quality monitoring network where sensors contribute to a public pollution map and earn tokens.
sui_advantage: Sensor data objects timestamped by Sui consensus, shared map objects aggregate readings, Walrus stores historical data, PTBs distribute rewards.

name: ChargingNet
one_liner: Decentralized EV charging network where charger owners earn tokens and drivers pay in crypto.
sui_advantage: Charger objects with dynamic fields track availability and pricing, PTBs handle session-payment-reward atomically, zkLogin for driver authentication.

name: BandwidthExchange
one_liner: Bandwidth trading marketplace where ISPs and individuals buy/sell excess network capacity.
sui_advantage: Bandwidth credit Coin objects tradeable on DeepBook, capacity objects track allocation, PTBs settle bandwidth contracts atomically.

name: MapDAO
one_liner: Community-maintained decentralized mapping platform where contributors earn for adding and verifying geographic data.
sui_advantage: Map tile objects owned by contributors, verification via shared objects and multi-party attestation, Walrus stores map imagery, PTBs distribute rewards.

name: MachineRegistry
one_liner: On-chain registry for IoT devices with identity management, firmware tracking, and access control.
sui_advantage: Device identity objects with capability tokens for access control, dynamic fields track firmware versions, PTBs batch device registration.

name: SolarDAO
one_liner: Community solar farm co-ownership platform where members buy shares and receive proportional energy credits.
sui_advantage: Solar share objects represent ownership, energy credit Coins distributed via PTBs proportionally, governance via shared DAO objects.

name: NoiseMap
one_liner: Crowdsourced noise pollution mapping using smartphone microphones with privacy-preserving data collection.
sui_advantage: Aggregated noise data objects without individual identification, Seal for privacy, Walrus stores noise maps, sponsored transactions for passive contribution.

name: ModelMarket
one_liner: AI model marketplace where developers sell, license, and compose machine learning models as on-chain assets.
sui_advantage: Model objects with licensing terms in dynamic fields, Seal encrypts model weights, PTBs handle purchase-license-download atomically, Walrus stores models.

name: InferenceCredits
one_liner: Tokenized AI inference credits that work across multiple compute providers with standardized pricing.
sui_advantage: Inference credit Coins are fungible and tradeable on DeepBook, PTBs handle credit purchase and inference request atomically, cross-provider compatibility.

name: DataLabel
one_liner: Decentralized data labeling platform where workers earn tokens for annotating AI training data.
sui_advantage: Task objects distribute labeling work, quality validation via multi-labeler consensus on shared objects, PTBs distribute rewards, Walrus stores datasets.

name: FedLearn
one_liner: Federated learning coordination platform where participants train models without sharing raw data.
sui_advantage: Model update objects track training rounds, Seal encrypts gradient updates, PTBs aggregate updates atomically, Walrus stores model checkpoints.

name: PromptVault
one_liner: Marketplace for AI prompts where creators sell prompt templates and buyers rate effectiveness.
sui_advantage: Prompt objects with Seal-encrypted content revealed only after purchase, rating system via dynamic fields, PTBs handle purchase-reveal atomically.

name: AIAudit
one_liner: AI model audit platform that verifies training data provenance, bias testing, and performance claims on-chain.
sui_advantage: Audit report objects provide immutable records, test result objects with dynamic fields store metrics, Walrus stores audit evidence.

name: SyntheticData
one_liner: Synthetic data generation marketplace where providers create privacy-safe training data for AI models.
sui_advantage: Dataset objects with quality metrics in dynamic fields, Walrus stores generated data, PTBs handle purchase and access grant atomically.

name: AgentRegistry
one_liner: On-chain registry for AI agents with reputation scores, capability declarations, and interaction history.
sui_advantage: Agent identity objects with dynamic fields for capabilities and reputation, interaction logs as Sui objects, SuiNS for agent naming.

name: TrainingDAO
one_liner: Community-funded AI model training where contributors pool resources and share ownership of trained models.
sui_advantage: Training fund as shared DAO object, contributor shares as Coin objects, PTBs distribute model ownership NFTs, Walrus stores trained models.

name: AIBenchmark
one_liner: Decentralized AI benchmarking platform where model performance is verified by multiple independent evaluators.
sui_advantage: Benchmark result objects from multiple evaluators aggregated via shared objects, PTBs collect results atomically, immutable score history on Sui.

name: DataDAO
one_liner: Community-governed data cooperative where members contribute data and collectively negotiate licensing with AI companies.
sui_advantage: Data contribution objects tracked on Sui, Seal encrypts sensitive data, DAO governance via shared objects, PTBs distribute licensing revenue.

name: EmbeddingStore
one_liner: Decentralized vector embedding storage and similarity search service for AI applications.
sui_advantage: Embedding objects stored on Walrus with Sui object indexes for metadata, Seal encrypts proprietary embeddings, access control via Sui capabilities.

name: AgentWallet
one_liner: Smart wallet designed for AI agents with spending limits, permitted actions, and human oversight controls.
sui_advantage: Move-based spending policies enforce agent limits, capability objects restrict permitted actions, PTBs enable complex multi-step agent operations atomically.

name: ModelInsurance
one_liner: Insurance protocol covering AI model failures, hallucinations, and incorrect outputs with on-chain claims.
sui_advantage: Policy objects with coverage terms in dynamic fields, claim objects with evidence on Walrus, PTBs handle premium payment and claim settlement atomically.

name: FineTuneMarket
one_liner: Marketplace for fine-tuned AI models where domain experts sell specialized models for niche use cases.
sui_advantage: Model objects with performance benchmarks in dynamic fields, Seal encrypts model weights, Walrus stores models, DeepBook for pricing.

name: ZKVote
one_liner: Anonymous voting platform where votes are verifiable but voter identity remains completely private.
sui_advantage: ZK proofs verify vote eligibility without revealing identity, vote objects on Sui are publicly verifiable, PTBs batch vote tallying.

name: PrivatePay
one_liner: Privacy-preserving payment system where transaction amounts and participants are hidden using ZK proofs.
sui_advantage: Commitment objects hide transaction details while Sui ensures settlement, PTBs handle proof verification and transfer atomically.

name: ProofOfAge
one_liner: Age verification service that proves someone is over a threshold age without revealing their actual age or birthday.
sui_advantage: ZK proof verification on Sui combined with zkLogin's OAuth data, age attestation objects are reusable across dApps without re-proving.

name: DarkPool
one_liner: Private orderbook exchange where order details are hidden until matched, preventing front-running.
sui_advantage: Committed orders as Sui objects with ZK proofs of validity, PTBs handle order matching and settlement atomically, Seal for order encryption.

name: ZKCredential
one_liner: Credential verification system where users prove qualifications without revealing the credential details.
sui_advantage: ZK proof objects on Sui verify credential properties, credential issuers registered via SuiNS, proofs composable across multiple verifiers.

name: PrivateAuction
one_liner: Sealed-bid auction platform where bids are hidden until the auction closes, ensuring fair price discovery.
sui_advantage: Bid commitments as Sui objects with ZK proofs of valid amounts, Seal encrypts bids, PTBs handle reveal and settlement atomically.

name: WhistleProof
one_liner: ZK-powered whistleblowing where insiders prove organizational affiliation without revealing their identity.
sui_advantage: ZK proofs verify membership in an organization using zkLogin OAuth tokens without revealing the specific account, reports stored on Walrus.

name: PrivateNFT
one_liner: NFT platform where ownership can be proven without revealing which specific NFTs you hold.
sui_advantage: ZK set membership proofs over Sui objects, prove ownership of an NFT in a collection without revealing which one, Seal encrypts NFT metadata.

name: ComplianceProof
one_liner: ZK compliance layer that proves regulatory adherence without exposing underlying transaction or identity data.
sui_advantage: ZK proofs verify compliance criteria against Sui transaction history without exposing details, attestation objects are reusable across auditors.

name: ZKOracle
one_liner: Oracle service that proves data authenticity from web sources using ZK proofs without trusting the oracle operator.
sui_advantage: Proof objects on Sui verify web data authenticity, PTBs consume oracle data and execute conditional logic atomically, composable with any Sui dApp.

name: CopyTrade
one_liner: Social trading platform where users copy the strategies of top Sui traders with automated mirroring.
sui_advantage: Monitors leader wallet transactions via Sui events, PTBs replicate multi-step strategies atomically, DeepBook for execution, performance tracked on-chain.

name: PredictSui
one_liner: Prediction market platform where users bet on real-world outcomes with binary and scalar markets.
sui_advantage: Market objects as shared resources handle concurrent bets, PTBs create positions atomically, on-chain resolution via oracle objects, DeepBook for order matching.

name: TrustLend
one_liner: Reputation-based lending where on-chain activity and social vouching determine loan terms instead of collateral.
sui_advantage: Reputation objects aggregate cross-dApp activity on Sui, vouch objects create social graphs, PTBs handle loan origination and repayment atomically.

name: CommunityFund
one_liner: Community investment clubs where members pool capital, vote on investments, and share returns.
sui_advantage: Fund as shared DAO object with member share tracking, PTBs execute investment decisions atomically, DeepBook for trade execution, transparent on-chain accounting.

name: BetFriend
one_liner: Peer-to-peer betting platform where friends create custom wagers with automated settlement.
sui_advantage: Bet objects with escrow and custom resolution logic in Move, PTBs lock stakes from both parties atomically, zkLogin for casual bettor onboarding.

name: SplitInvest
one_liner: Fractional investment platform where groups split the cost of expensive assets like NFTs or real-world assets.
sui_advantage: Fraction Coin objects represent ownership shares, PTBs handle group purchase atomically, DeepBook enables secondary market for fractions.

name: StakeTogether
one_liner: Social staking pool where friends stake SUI together and compete on validator selection strategy.
sui_advantage: Pool objects manage collective stake across Sui validators, PTBs redistribute stake per epoch based on group votes, transparent yield tracking.

name: TipChain
one_liner: Social tipping economy where tips cascade through content sharing chains, rewarding both creators and sharers.
sui_advantage: Tip chain objects track sharing lineage using parent-child relationships, PTBs distribute cascading tips atomically across all sharers.

name: CreditCircle
one_liner: Rotating savings and credit association (ROSCA) on-chain where trusted circles pool and distribute funds.
sui_advantage: Circle objects manage member contributions and payout schedule, PTBs handle collection and distribution atomically, reputation objects track reliability.

name: OpinionMarket
one_liner: Market where users stake tokens on opinions about Sui ecosystem projects and earn for correct predictions.
sui_advantage: Opinion objects with staked amounts tracked via dynamic fields, resolution via on-chain metrics from Sui protocol objects, PTBs for atomic settlement.

name: VirtualLand
one_liner: Virtual land marketplace where parcels are Sui objects with composable structures and cross-platform portability.
sui_advantage: Land objects own nested building objects which contain furniture objects, demonstrating Sui's composable object model for rich virtual worlds.

name: DigiFashion
one_liner: Digital fashion house where designers create virtual wearables for avatars across multiple metaverse platforms.
sui_advantage: Wearable NFTs with dynamic fields store rendering data for multiple platforms, Walrus stores 3D models, royalty enforcement via Move.

name: EventVerse
one_liner: Virtual event hosting platform with ticketed access, interactive spaces, and post-event NFT memorabilia.
sui_advantage: Ticket NFTs grant access via on-chain verification, event space objects manage concurrent attendees as shared objects, Walrus stores event recordings.

name: AssetForge3D
one_liner: 3D asset creation and trading platform where creators mint interoperable models as NFTs.
sui_advantage: 3D model files on Walrus, asset NFTs with dynamic fields for format variants and compatibility metadata, DeepBook for trading.

name: AvatarBuilder
one_liner: Cross-platform avatar system where a single identity object represents you across all Sui-connected virtual worlds.
sui_advantage: Avatar objects with nested wearable objects demonstrate Sui's composability, SuiNS provides the universal identity, dynamic fields store platform-specific rendering data.

name: VirtualGallery
one_liner: 3D virtual art gallery where collectors display NFTs in customizable spaces visitors can walk through.
sui_advantage: Gallery objects own wall objects that reference displayed NFTs, visitors interact via shared objects, Walrus stores 3D gallery assets.

name: VRMeetup
one_liner: VR meeting rooms with crypto-native features like token-gated access, on-chain whiteboarding, and tip jars.
sui_advantage: Room objects with access control via NFT ownership, whiteboard state as shared objects, PTBs handle meeting setup atomically.

name: WorldBuilder
one_liner: User-generated content platform where players build and monetize virtual worlds using on-chain building blocks.
sui_advantage: Building block objects compose into structure objects via Sui's nested object model, world objects are shared for multiplayer building, Walrus for asset storage.

name: StageShow
one_liner: Virtual concert and performance platform where artists perform in digital venues with tokenized tickets.
sui_advantage: Venue objects manage capacity, ticket NFTs with dynamic fields track attendance and unlock backstage areas, PTBs handle ticketing atomically.

name: DigitalTwin
one_liner: Digital twin platform that creates on-chain representations of physical objects with IoT data feeds.
sui_advantage: Twin objects mirror physical assets with IoT data in dynamic fields, ownership transfers track real-world asset transfers, Walrus stores sensor history.

name: LabFund
one_liner: Decentralized science funding platform where communities fund research proposals and share in IP outcomes.
sui_advantage: Research grant objects with milestone-based fund release via PTBs, IP-NFT objects represent intellectual property rights, DAO governance for funding decisions.

name: PeerReview
one_liner: Decentralized peer review platform where reviewers earn tokens and reviews are permanently recorded.
sui_advantage: Review objects are immutable Sui records, reviewer reputation tracked via dynamic fields, Walrus stores papers, PTBs distribute review rewards.

name: DataShare
one_liner: Scientific data sharing platform where researchers publish datasets and earn citations tracked on-chain.
sui_advantage: Dataset objects with metadata in dynamic fields, Walrus stores research data, Seal encrypts sensitive data with conditional access, citation objects form reference graphs.

name: IPToken
one_liner: Intellectual property tokenization platform where patents and research outputs become tradeable NFTs.
sui_advantage: IP-NFTs with dynamic fields track licensing terms, royalty rates, and usage rights, PTBs handle licensing and royalty distribution atomically, DeepBook for IP trading.

name: LabNotebook
one_liner: On-chain laboratory notebook where experiments are timestamped and immutably recorded for reproducibility.
sui_advantage: Experiment entry objects timestamped by Sui consensus prove priority, Walrus stores data and images, notebook objects use dynamic fields for organization.

name: ClinicalTrial
one_liner: Transparent clinical trial registration and results reporting with tamper-proof on-chain records.
sui_advantage: Trial protocol objects are immutable once published, result objects prevent selective reporting, Seal encrypts patient data, Walrus stores trial documents.

name: ResearchDAO
one_liner: Research-focused DAO where scientists propose, fund, and govern collaborative research programs.
sui_advantage: Proposal objects with milestone tracking via dynamic fields, shared treasury object, PTBs distribute funding upon milestone verification, Walrus stores deliverables.

name: BioBank
one_liner: Decentralized biobank registry where sample donors maintain ownership and consent control over their biological data.
sui_advantage: Consent objects managed by donors with granular permission control, Seal encrypts sample data, consent revocation enforced by Move smart contracts.

name: ProtocolDAO
one_liner: Platform for sharing and improving research protocols where contributors earn from protocol usage.
sui_advantage: Protocol objects with version history via dynamic fields, fork tracking through parent-child relationships, Walrus stores protocol documents, PTBs distribute usage rewards.

name: ScholarGraph
one_liner: Academic reputation system that tracks citations, reviews, and collaborations as an on-chain knowledge graph.
sui_advantage: Scholar profile objects with dynamic fields for metrics, citation objects form an on-chain graph, composable reputation readable by any funding platform.

name: GovHub
one_liner: Universal DAO governance platform supporting multiple voting mechanisms and cross-DAO delegation.
sui_advantage: DAO objects with pluggable voting modules via dynamic fields, PTBs handle proposal creation and voting atomically, delegation objects enable liquid democracy.

name: QuadraVote
one_liner: Quadratic voting platform where voting power scales with the square root of tokens committed.
sui_advantage: Quadratic voting logic enforced in Move, vote objects track individual allocations, PTBs handle multi-proposal voting in one transaction, anti-sybil via SuiNS.

name: DelegateDAO
one_liner: Delegation marketplace where token holders delegate voting power to expert representatives with track records.
sui_advantage: Delegation objects transfer voting power while retaining token ownership, delegate profiles with dynamic fields track voting history and alignment scores.

name: TreasuryOS
one_liner: DAO treasury management system with budgeting, spending proposals, and automated financial reporting.
sui_advantage: Treasury as shared object with Move-enforced spending policies, PTBs execute approved budgets atomically, financial reports generated from on-chain object data.

name: ProposalForge
one_liner: Governance proposal creation tool with templates, impact analysis, and community discussion threads.
sui_advantage: Proposal objects with rich dynamic fields for analysis and discussion, Walrus stores supporting documents, PTBs handle proposal submission and funding requests.

name: ConstitutionDAO
one_liner: On-chain constitution framework where DAOs define and enforce fundamental rules that require supermajority to change.
sui_advantage: Constitution objects with amendment thresholds enforced in Move, PTBs handle complex multi-step amendment processes, immutable audit trail on Sui.

name: VetoDAO
one_liner: Optimistic governance system where proposals auto-execute unless vetoed by a guardian council within a timelock.
sui_advantage: Timelock objects leverage Sui's epoch-based timing, veto capability objects held by guardians, PTBs handle execution or cancellation atomically.

name: MultiDAO
one_liner: Multi-DAO coordination platform where interdependent DAOs can create joint proposals and shared governance.
sui_advantage: Cross-DAO proposal objects reference governance objects from multiple DAOs, PTBs execute joint decisions atomically across organizations.

name: GovAnalytics
one_liner: Governance analytics dashboard tracking voter participation, proposal outcomes, and delegate performance across Sui DAOs.
sui_advantage: Reads DAO shared objects and vote objects to compute governance metrics, tracks delegation patterns, monitors quorum achievement rates.

name: BountyGov
one_liner: Governance-driven bounty system where DAOs create, fund, and manage bounties through formal proposal processes.
sui_advantage: Bounty objects linked to governance proposals, PTBs create bounties with escrowed funds upon proposal approval, completion verified via multi-sig attestation.
